debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
δL : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) → ℝ
hδL0 : δL 0 = 0
h : ClassicalMechanics.Lagrangian.IsTotalTimeDerivative n fun x v x_1 => δL v
⊢ ∃ g, ∀ (v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n)), δL v = inner ℝ g v

proof:
obtain ⟨ F, hF ⟩ := h
  obtain ⟨L, hL⟩ : ∃ L : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ →L[ℝ] ℝ, ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) × ℝ, (fderiv ℝ F (0, 0)) v = L v := by
    exact ⟨ _, fun v => rfl ⟩
  obtain ⟨g, hg⟩ : ∃ g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), L (v, 0) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
    have hL_zero : ∃ g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), L (v, 0) = ⟪g, v⟫_ℝ := by
      have hL_zero : ∃ g : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n) →L[ℝ] ℝ, ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), L (v, 0) = g v := by
        exact ⟨ L.comp ( ContinuousLinearMap.inl ℝ _ _ ), fun v => rfl ⟩
      obtain ⟨ g, hg ⟩ := hL_zero; use ( InnerProductSpace.toDual ℝ ( EuclideanSpace ℝ ( Fin n ) ) ).symm g; aesop
    exact hL_zero
  have hL_zero : L (0, 1) = 0 := by
    have := hF.2 0 0 0; aesop
  have hL_eq : ∀ v : EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin n), δL v = L (v, 1) := by
    exact fun v => by simpa [ hL ] using hF.2 0 v 0
  use g
  intro v; rw [ hL_eq v, ← hg v ] ; simp +decide [ hL_zero, ContinuousLinearMap.map_add ]
  rw [ ← sub_eq_zero, ← map_sub ] ; aesop
